prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CATCHBALL-PARENT Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): TychoTyke Existing Title: TychoTyke Kids Toss Catch Ball Sticky Paddle Outdoor Party Game Set ORANGE Description: Promote exercise during playtime with the TychoTyke Kids Sticky Catch Ball Playset.

This classic game is easy to play - each person places one hand through the strap on the back of their paddle and stand opposite of each other. Then one person throws the ball to the other, and he or she tries to catch the ball with their sticky paddle. Games like these will help your child improve their hand-eye coordination while promoting physical activity.

All of the game components are made of durable materials, so the game can be played inside or outside making this a great option for picnics, beach parties, pool parties, and outdoor events. The sticky paddle design will help reduce the risk of injuries, and there's less chance that the ball will be lost during playtime.

This fun game is a great idea for parents looking to get their kids off the couch and up for some exciting physical activity. It's safe for all children ages 3 and up.

2 Colors Available: Black or Orange Search Terms: catch and toss games toy ball outdoor for kids sticky playsets paddle game glove goalie exercise toys pool party Features: - CLASSIC CATCH BALL GAME - Super Easy and Fun to Play Game is Great for Indoor or Outdoor Play - STICKY PADDLES - Comes with Hook & Loop "Sticky" Paddles that Catch Ball | Don't Worry About Losing the Ball During Playtime - PROMOTES EXERCISE - Get Your Kids Off the Couch and Engaging in Fun Physical Activity - IMPROVE HAND-EYE COORDINATION - Catch and Toss Game Helps Improve Coordination, Balance and Stability for Young Kids - SAFE FOR KIDS - Durable Sticky Material Helps Prevent Injuries; Safe for Ages 3 and Up === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
